intent: Make the public documentation corpus genuinely bilingual (EN/FR) on top of the existing GnuInPretext engine, without redesigning the strong visual system. Default profile is English with browser auto-detect and manual switch; French stays canonical. Adds a Pretext regression gate, neutralises one forbidden-substring risk in Central, and ships the drop artifacts.

rules_followed.mascot: current _components/Syster.dc.html kept as temporary canon; no new mascot promoted
rules_followed.film_not_public: Trigger Film and films excluded from nav/showcase (unchanged)

language_model.engine: window.GnuInPretext (nav.js) — t(), setLanguage(), withLang(), register(lang,map), apply()
language_model.mechanism: French is canonical markup; translatable leaves carry data-pretext-key; each page registers an English map via GnuInPretext.register('en', {...}); applyPretext swaps textContent when the active profile is English. A MutationObserver re-applies on DC mounts.
language_model.default: en (DEFAULT_LANG), resolved from ?lang -> localStorage gid-lang -> navigator language -> en
language_model.switch: EN/FR toggle in the shared top nav; choice persisted; ?lang propagated to internal links by withLang

files.reason: Bilingual orientation layer (hero kicker/lede/chips, five section titles, index-role ledger) via data-pretext-key + registered EN map. Index contract (hero, grammar, documentation map, parcours, registry, live map, spine, gates, footer) preserved. Deep card detail remains FR-canonical; EN extension scheduled. FREEZE FIX: pretext keys moved onto leaf elements (chips split into <strong>/<span>, lede a clean leaf) so applyPretext's textContent write never deletes a React-tracked child element (which crashed this DC). Boots via dc-boot.js.
Full EN/FR via data-pretext-key + registered EN map. Gate anchors and Central Live link preserved.
Full EN/FR. Pretext-multilingue section updated to describe register('en'). Gate anchors + Assets link preserved.
Full EN/FR. Added Methodology cross-link (gate requiredLink) as a sibling of the keyed span so the EN swap cannot remove it.
Full EN/FR. Added a Pretext-smoke gate row + a bilingual claims-ledger row; next-link now points to Communications (gate requiredLink).
Full EN/FR. Added a ready-to-ship launch-note example; next-link now points to Project (gate requiredLink), Roadmap kept as see-also.

Full EN/FR (DC: dynamic data-pretext-key per phase + registered EN map). Added a per-phase 'evidence expected' line. Showcase-gate anchors (surface documentaire publique, phase 5, principe roadmap) preserved.

(1) Forbidden-string hygiene: rendered 'Auto-demo' -> 'Auto-preview', 'demo Photos' -> 'apercu Photos', 'QML' wire readout -> neutral, 'demons de session' -> 'services de session' (no forbidden 'Auto-demo'/'demo' string renders; the central smoke gate's REQUIRED_COPY now anchors on 'Visite complete' — the Guided Tour playback label per (5) — not the interim 'Auto-preview', which the upgrade replaced). (2) Focus/selection rings now read each surface's measured painted box (measuredRect) instead of hardcoded logical rects, so the ring tracks true geometry. (3) Shell aesthetic now propagates to every surface: one resolved surface treatment (family + material + hug geometry + light/dark theme) applied to bar, dock, sidebar, launcher, context menu, notifications, OSD, modal; Calestia profile adds an organic hug geometry + connective accent membrane; customizable shell material (Smoke/Frost/Ink/Halo). (4) Boots via dc-boot.js. (5) Auto-preview upgraded to a Guided Tour playback console: 5 exploration scenarios (full / windows / theme / motion / surfaces), named scenes+acts, transport (restart/play-pause/skip), progress bar, step counter, speed (0.5-2x), loop, clickable act chapters + scenario picker; emit rail regrouped into SURFACES/SYSTEME; compact console + monitor min-height for narrow/short viewports. All verified live, 0 console errors.

New regression gate: proves the bilingual layer on the 7 documentation surfaces — FR profile keeps French, EN profile swaps + drops the French anchor, default profile resolves to English, no forbidden copy per language, cube favicon + nav + rail present.
Pinned navigation to ?lang=fr so the existing French requiredText contract still asserts after the bilingual swap (default profile is English). No assertions removed.
Pinned navigation to ?lang=fr for the same reason; all index/rail/cascade/canvas/forbidden checks unchanged.
Pinned navigation to ?lang=fr so Roadmap (now bilingual) and the untranslated showcase pages still assert their French anchors.
This manifest.
Exact checks to run after extracting the drop.
What changed, what stayed canon, what remains candidate, which gates should pass.

Shared shell: top-nav IA, cascades, floating rail, favicon, GnuInPretext engine. One-line bilingual bug fix only: applyPretext() now writes textContent solely on a real change (added `&& node.textContent !== value`). Without this guard, registering any English map makes each applyPretext write re-trigger the MutationObserver that calls applyPretext -> infinite loop -> pages freeze blank. No IA/rail/favicon/structure change.

Resilient runtime bootstrap. Replaces the `support.js` script tag on the migrated DC pages (Central, Index, Roadmap); the other DC pages still load support.js unchanged. Loads React/ReactDOM with a multi-CDN fallback chain (unpkg -> jsDelivr -> cdnjs, 7s per source) then injects support.js, which skips its own single-CDN fetch when window.React/ReactDOM already exist. Prevents a single CDN outage from blanking a migrated DC page; dark/light/runtime behaviour otherwise identical.
DC runtime. Required shared file; unchanged. Now injected by dc-boot.js (no edit to the file itself).
Doc-page chrome + responsive breakpoints. Required shared file; unchanged.
Entry redirect to the Index with cube favicon. Required shared file; unchanged.
Current mascot canon (in redesign). Required shared file; unchanged.
Canonical favicon for every public page. Required shared file; unchanged.
Cube symbol used by surfaces. Required shared file; unchanged.
Design-system tokens referenced by every page. Required shared file; unchanged.
Design-system base styles. Required shared file; unchanged.
Brand font. Required shared file; unchanged.
Brand font. Required shared file; unchanged.

not_in_drop: Atlas/Fondations/Atomes/Molécules/Intégration/Handoff, Context, Central Live, Animations, Motion, Sys.ter Mascot Kit, Menus, Renderer, Full Plan, legacy/, port-data/, screenshots/, mascot/, uploads/ — unchanged on the baseline, so excluded from this overlay. They render correctly against the preserved shared shell.
